news.summary: Vigil Neuroscience, Inc. announced a deal with Sanofi for acquisition at an equity value of around $470 million. Sanofi will pay $8.00 per share in cash for Vigil and shareholders may receive an additional $2.00 per share through a non-tradeable contingent value right (CVR) if VG-3927 achieves its first commercial sale within a specified period. The total equity value of the transaction, including the potential CVR payment, is estimated at about $600 million. The acquisition is projected to conclude in the third quarter. Additionally, Vigil Neuroscience's Alzheimer's candidate has shown a promising safety profile, with plans for a mid-stage study to commence in Q3.
news.headline: Sanofi to acquire Vigil Neuroscience for $470 million in equity, with additional $130 million potential.

news.summary: In an age where the cost of childcare is prohibitively high for numerous families, a fresh report reveals that directors are also facing challenges as they are overwhelmed with time-consuming tasks such as reporting, scheduling, and communication. The study, released in ARLINGTON, Va. on May 22, 2025, highlights the struggle faced by families who cannot afford proper care and also sheds light on the pressure directors face due to relentless administrative responsibilities. This situation underscores the urgency of addressing the childcare crisis, with X% of families unable to access affordable care, while directors are grappling with managing tasks on a daily basis.
news.headline: Childcare leaders face stress and overtime crisis, struggling with reporting, scheduling, and communication tasks.

news.summary: Jamie Dimon, the Chairman and CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co., discussed the challenges of significant deficits, inflation, and geopolitical risks within the U.S. economy during an interview with Bloomberg Television at the Global China Summit in Shanghai. Dimon aligned with the Federal Reserve's approach of observing the situation before considering interest rate cuts, but he expressed concerns about the likelihood of the U.S. economy entering a period of "stagflation," characterized by slow growth and high inflation rates due to risks from geopolitics, deficits, and price pressures. Dimon disagreed with the notion of the economy being in an advantageous position, emphasizing the potential negative impacts. Additionally, he acknowledged the initial trade discussions with China, pointing out that the U.S. government likely desires to maintain ties with China despite uncertainties. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Jamie Dimon warns US of stagflation risk amid Trump-China tensions, highlighting deficits and price pressures.

news.summary: A recent survey by Independent Reserve reveals that in Singapore, 94% of respondents are familiar with digital assets, but ownership has decreased from 40% in 2023 to 29% in 2024. Men are more active in crypto investing than women, with 35% of men compared to 24% of women. Millennials and Gen X (aged 25-54) make up 71% of all crypto holders. Despite the ownership decline, sentiment is positive, with 53% of current holders planning to increase their positions in the next year. Bitcoin remains dominant in the market, held by 68% of investors. 77% believe Bitcoin will surpass $100,000 by 2030. Direct ownership is preferred by 61% of investors over ETFs. 46% of investors hold stablecoins, primarily for trading and DeFi activities. Memecoins, like Dogecoin, are also popular. Singapore has emerged as a global hub for blockchain and crypto, leading in blockchain patents and having 81 active exchanges. The Monetary Authority of Singapore granted 13 major payment institution licenses to crypto exchanges in 2024, indicating regulatory support for the sector's growth.
news.headline: 94% of Singaporeans aware of crypto, 68% hold BTC, but ownership down to 29% from 40% in 2023. Source: Independent Reserve.

news.summary: For the fourth consecutive year, Skanska has been recognized as one of Europe's Climate Leaders by the Financial Times and data insights firm Statista. The company's sustainability efforts have been acknowledged, cementing their position as a leader in this area. This marks a significant achievement for Skanska, reflecting their ongoing commitment to environmental responsibility. The recognition underscores their dedication to sustainability, with this being the fourth consecutive year they have received this prestigious acknowledgment.
news.headline: Skanska named Europe's Climate Leader by FT for fourth year. Recognized for sustainability.

news.summary: In Toronto on May 22, 2025, NexGold Mining Corp. announced that the Crown Land Lease and License for the Goldboro Gold Project has been approved by the Government of Nova Scotia. NexGold (TSXV: NEXG; OTCQX: NXGCF) is pleased to confirm this significant development for the Project.

news.summary: Meril Life Sciences, based in VAPI, India, recently revealed one-year results from the pivotal LANDMARK trial, showcasing the performance and safety of their Next Gen Myval THV series. This head-to-head TAVI trial marks a significant milestone, emphasizing the effectiveness of the THV series. The results were presented at a prestigious Late-Breaking Trial event. The trial is the first of its kind and the numbers presented reinforce the positive outcomes observed.
news.headline: Meril presents successful one-year results of LANDMARK trial at EuroPCR 2025, reinforcing performance and safety of Myval THV series.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Knox Systems announced its support for the Department of Defense's Software Fast Track (SWFT) initiative. Knox Systems is the provider of the largest and longest-running FedRAMP and DISA-authorized SaaS cloud in the federal market. This initiative aims to revolutionize the software procurement process. Washington and New York-based Knox Systems is a key player in this endeavor, underscoring its commitment to innovation and government partnerships.
news.headline: Knox Systems supports DoD's SWFT initiative to fast-track secure software. Largest FedRAMP and DISA-authorized SaaS cloud.

news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas, Southland Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: SLND and SLND WS) disclosed the addition of Tan Parker to its Board of Directors, commencing on May 19, 2025. Mr. Parker's appointment brings a wealth of experience from both the public and private sectors to Southland. With close to twenty years of legislative involvement and a strong background in the private industry, Mr. Parker is set to enhance the operations of Southland Holdings, a prominent provider of specialized infrastructure construction services.
news.headline: Tan Parker joins Southland Holdings' Board of Directors on May 19, 2025, bringing 20 years of combined public and private sector expertise.

news.summary: A new hormone replacement therapy (HRT) option is now accessible through Eden's platform in the majority of U.S. states. This program offers estradiol cream, patches, and compounded progesterone under clinical supervision. Eden, a prominent health platform that links individuals with licensed healthcare providers, launched this service. The rollout began on May 22, 2025, from Denver.
news.headline: Eden now offers female hormone therapy via telehealth in most U.S. states, providing access to estradiol cream, patches, and compounded progesterone.
